message:
Enhance hero section: wider layout, more breathing room, parallax orbs

app/page.tsx:
- Increase hero bottom padding from pb-10 to pb-32 to give the section
  more vertical breathing room and prevent the hero content from feeling
  cramped against the sections below it.
- Widen the hero inner container from max-w-7xl (1280px) to
  max-w-screen-2xl (1536px) to better utilize screen real estate on
  large displays while maintaining the same px-6/lg:px-8 side padding.
- Add z-30 to the floating "100h Build Time" stats card so it renders
  above adjacent content layers. Without an explicit z-index, the card
  could be painted behind elements with their own stacking contexts
  (e.g., FrankenContainer children at z-20).

components/glow-orbits.tsx:
- Add mouse-tracked parallax to the three hero glow orbs using Framer
  Motion spring physics. Mouse position is captured via a window
  mousemove listener, fed into useMotionValue → useSpring (damped at
  50, stiffness 100 for smooth, heavy-feeling response) → useTransform
  mapping [0..1000]px cursor range to [-20..20]px offset. The root
  element is upgraded from <div> to <motion.div> with style={{x,y}}
  parallax transforms.
- Remove the intersection-observer-based animation pause/resume
  effect. The initial reduced-motion check + cleanup-on-unmount is
  sufficient — the pause/resume added complexity for marginal GPU
  savings on a lightweight blur animation.
- Remove the handleMotionChange media query listener (the prefers-
  reduced-motion check at effect start already prevents animation
  setup entirely when the preference is active).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
